creator: nospam@ofloo.net
text:
happens on make buildworld removed /usr/obj and recompiled but gives same result

# cat /etc/make.conf 
# Build all ports' -march against my cpu for best performance
CPUTYPE?=native
# Use clang instead of gcc, only needed for versions before 10.0
CC=clang
CXX=clang++
CPP=clang-cpp
NO_X=yes
WITHOUT_X11=yes
KERNCONF=OFL

# cat OFL
#
# CUSTOM KERNEL
#
include                 GENERIC
ident                   OFL
options                 IPFIREWALL
options                 IPFIREWALL_VERBOSE
options                 IPFIREWALL_DEFAULT_TO_ACCEPT
options                 DUMMYNET
options                 IPDIVERT
options                 CONSPEED=115200


# svn info

Working Copy Root Path: /usr/src
